note: Option wording verbatim-identical to ours on official base (infotech ticket 4600, image web.testpdr.com/storage/questions/QNS_4600.jpg). Analyzed the official image directly: N-S road is MAIN (головна дорога diamonds top-left+bottom-right), E-W is SECONDARY (give-way triangles top-right+bottom-left). White (bottom) straight + red (top) left-turn are on the main road => white 1st, red 2nd (oncoming straight beats left turn). Bicycle (west) straight + blue (east) left-turn are on the secondary road and oncoming => blue yields to straight bicycle (ПДР 16.13) => bicycle 3rd, blue 4th. Order = White, Red, Bicycle, Blue = OPTION 2 'Білий, червоний автомобілі, велосипед, синій автомобілі'. Corroborated by green-way explanation (@elucidation_gw: 'правильним варіантом буде другий') and alt_read=2. Stored current_answer=3 (blue before bicycle) is WRONG: it has the left-turning blue going before the straight-through bicycle, contradicting 16.13. The earlier 'option 3' web result was an unverified fetch-model guess; testpdr.online/pdr.infotech do NOT visually mark an answer.
